modes.name: Signal Brief
modes.purpose: Turn current source-backed items into a publishable GenLens briefing.
modes.quality_bar: Only include real releases, research, case studies, pricing/policy changes, production workflows, and high-signal hiring or funding evidence.

modes.name: Role Radar
modes.purpose: Convert job and hiring signals into observed, emerging, and forecast AI creative roles.
modes.quality_bar: Clearly label observed versus forecast. Extract tools, skills, workflow verbs, salary/location, and role mutation.

modes.name: Build This
modes.purpose: Generate weekend-scoped proof builds tied to emerging creative AI roles.
modes.quality_bar: Every build must be live/linkable, specific, and scoped to a visible artifact.

modes.name: Market Map
modes.purpose: Map companies, tools, verticals, and repeated workflow clusters.
modes.quality_bar: Prefer repeated evidence across sources. Mark single-source observations as weak.

modes.name: Product Lab
modes.purpose: Turn repeated source, tool, and role patterns into GenLens product opportunities.
modes.quality_bar: Tie every proposed product to an observed user pain, repeated signal pattern, or role/tool graph gap.
